name: hyperwave-monorepo
description: HyperWave — global P2P stadium wave (Tether Developers Cup). Monorepo: the reusable Bare engine (packages/hyperwave-engine) + hosts (apps/*).

scripts.postinstall: node scripts/fix-bare-engines.js && node scripts/patch-secret-stream.js && node scripts/build-nsfw.mjs && node scripts/build-qr.mjs
scripts.test: npm test -w hyperwave-engine && npm test -w hyperwave-wallet-tron && npm test -w hyperwave-wallet-cashu
scripts.lint: prettier --check . && lunte packages apps/desktop scripts && eslint . && npm run lint:jsdoc -w hyperwave-engine && npm run lint:jsdoc -w hyperwave-wallet-tron && npm run lint:jsdoc -w hyperwave-wallet-cashu
